items.label: Infrastructure Written — Terraform
items.docNote:
Infrastructure validated. Resources affected:
- azurerm_api_management_api.sample — updated in-place to add /profile GET (getProfile) and PATCH (updateProfile) operations via OpenAPI spec (infra/api-specs/api-sample.openapi.yaml)
- No new Terraform resources needed — existing APIM policies (dual-mode demo/entra) already cover PATCH method and X-Demo-Token/Content-Type headers in CORS
- Profile endpoint schemas inline in OpenAPI: UserProfile (id uuid, displayName, email, theme enum[light,dark,system]), ProfileUpdate (displayName, theme)
- terraform plan: 0 to add, 4 to change (profile spec + existing drift), 0 to destroy
Outputs unchanged: apim_gateway_url is the frontend target for /sample/profile calls
